name: tokenmaxxing-ai
description: Token-efficient AI coding-agent workflows for repo context, simplification, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Generate repo context packs, simplify code, and review changes with approval-first workflows.
interface.longDescription: Tokenmaxxing AI provides portable coding-agent workflows for generating local-first GraphQ repo context packs, finding over-engineered code, reviewing codebases with lite/mid/ultra effort, asking for approval before edits, and verifying changes after implementation. GraphQ reads .tokenmaxxing.md to make context packs smarter; simplify and review can update .tokenmaxxing.md, a project-local adaptive memory file that records run counts, verification commands, recurring risks, false positives, and instruction adjustments so repeated runs improve over time.
defaultPrompt: Use tokenmaxxing-ai:graphq to generate the smallest safe context for this task before editing.
Use tokenmaxxing-ai:simplify on this module and update .tokenmaxxing.md when done.
Use tokenmaxxing-ai:review ultra for this repo and update .tokenmaxxing.md.
